title: monitoring — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based `features.json` gates. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for the health check evaluator. Off = RunHealthCheckJob no-ops. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of health_check_runs).
Master toggle for EvaluateAlertPoliciesJob. Off = no new alerts fire. Used only during widespread outages to prevent alert storms.
Master toggle for NotifyProvidersJob. Off = alerts fire + persist but never reach providers. Used only in test/staging envs OR during widespread provider outages.
Off = CircuitBreakerGate always allows. Every failure counts against the threshold but the breaker never opens. Used to force-through notifications during a provider recovery test.
Off = RetryFailedNotificationsJob does not enqueue new attempts. Failed notifications stay failed until manual replay. Used during queue-worker debugging.
Off = EscalateIncidentJob does not run. Unacknowledged incidents stay open past SLA without escalating. Used during on-call rotation gaps.
Off = HealthCheckRunObserver skips PII regex redaction of response_body. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation).
Off = monitoring_provider_configs.config stored in plaintext. NEVER flip off in production (compliance violation — credentials in plaintext).
Per-provider kill switch. Off = Sentry notifications skip. Used when Sentry is announced-degraded.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = failover to Opsgenie for pending P1 notifications.
Per-provider kill switch. Off = failover to PagerDuty for pending P1 notifications.
Off = AutoResolveIncidentJob skips. Only flip off for maintenance windows.
Off = PurgeExpiredHealthCheckRunsJob + PurgeResolvedIncidentsJob skip. Only flip off for DB migrations.
